canonical_invariant: If no valid object exists -> nothing happens.
closure_condition: No unauthorized reality mutation path exists.

surfaces.entrypoint: d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply mindshift-demo-local --local
deploy: echo "Direct deploy disabled as a convenience guard. Production deploys must use .github/workflows/governed-deploy.yml." && exit 1
deploy:dry-run: npx wrangler deploy src/index.ts --name mindshift-demo --compatibility-date 2026-05-18 --dry-run
graph:full: npm run graph:extract && npm run graph:load && npm run graph:runtime && npm run graph:governance
